key_learnings: Hydration needs vary based on body weight, climate, and activity level.
research_findings: Most users underestimate their daily fluid intake, excluding beverages other than water.
current_focus_areas: Integrating wearable sensor data to provide real-time hydration recommendations.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Collected hydration need baselines by body weight, climate, and activity. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: real-time hydration estimation from wearable sensors
climate and activity-adjusted fluid intake models
hydration impact on cognitive and physical performance
beverage types and their hydration equivalence
chronic dehydration risk factors and dietary indicators
collaboration_notes: Bot 10 actively asks Copilot for hydration tracking topics. Copilot provides research to improve personalised real-time hydration guidance. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
